name: SE Ranking
description: Cloud SEO platform providing rank tracking, keyword research, backlinks, on-page audit and related SEO data; offers an API to integrate SE Ranking data into external applications.

auth_methods.note: API uses an API token provided in the Authorization header as a bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <your_token>). The documentation page describes generating an API token in account Settings > API.

credential_access.note: The help article states that if the API section is not visible you must contact support (help@seranking.com or in-app chat) to request API access; availability may depend on subscription plan.

api_surface.note: The API docs list a wide set of endpoints (projects, keywords, rankings, competitors, backlinks, on-page), base URL https://api.seranking.com, and describes standard HTTP endpoints and responses.

buildability.note: Docs show clear REST API and token auth, but the Help Center indicates API access must be enabled by contacting support and may depend on plan; therefore automated self-serve credential issuance is not guaranteed.

queries: SE Ranking API token Authorization Bearer
